baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Help me plan a safe refactor and turn it into a GitHub issue.
evals.expected_output: A user-interview-driven refactor plan with tiny commits, risk controls, validation, and a GitHub issue body.
assertions: Asks clarifying questions before finalizing the plan.
Breaks the refactor into tiny reviewable commits.
